name: Spicy Cajun Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over high heat, combine margarine, garlic, and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Add the seasoning and herbs: cayenne pepper, black pepper, salt, crushed red pepper, dried thyme, dried basil, and dried oregano.
3. When the margarine is melted, add the tomato and shrimp to the skillet.
4. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring evenly to ensure all ingredients are well combined.
5. Add the beer and cover the skillet.
6. Continue cooking for 1 minute longer or until the shrimp turn pink.
7. Serve the spicy Cajun shrimp over cooked rice.
